results.text: Blinding Blizzard: Movement halved. Test Fortitude DR12 every hour or take d4 cold damage.
Reshaping Landscape: Glaciers shift. Test Wits DR12 to find a shortcut or hidden cave.
Howling Winds: Guile Tests disadvantage. Attacks suffer -2 penalty.
Frozen Fog: Test Fortitude DR12 or take d4 damage and half movement.
Dance of Ice: Glittering ice crystals fall. Oddly calm.
Fimbulwinter's Breath: Fortitude Tests disadvantage today. Failure = d4 cold damage.
